prompt:
Create a cinematic vertical-friendly background image for a faceless short-form video.

Short title: If You're Tired of Unanswered Prayers, Listen
Niche: Faith + Psychology + Encouragement
Tone: encouraging, calm, biblical

Requirements:
- No text
- No logos
- No watermarks
- No readable signage
- Clean center composition for captions
- Strong emotional clarity
- Vertical-video friendly composition
- Suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, and YouTube Shorts
- Avoid extreme close-up faces
- Prefer symbolic, atmospheric, or scenic imagery over identifiable people

Style:
cinematic, dramatic but tasteful, soft lighting, polished, realistic

Short script context:
If you're tired of unanswered prayers, listen to this. Sometimes silence isn't absence—it's an invitation to look inward. Ask God to search your heart with Psalm 139 and confess mixed motives. Name any bitterness and pray a guided release: 'Lord help me forgive.' Review how you steward time, money, and words; Luke 16 shows small faithfulness matters. If you spot a pattern, respond with humble repair, regular prayer, and simple acts of obedience. God hears honest hearts. Try the 7-day Prayer Audit to start practical change and hope.
